debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → ¬(Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args))

failed_attempts:
by
  intro w args e hw
  intro h
  have hg : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    simpa using (bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e)
  exact hw hg

by
  intro w args e hbad
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨hbits, heq⟩
  have hgood : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have := bits_good (p:=p) (inst✝:=inst✝) w args e
    have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → assert_bits args /\ e = bits2num args := this
    exact (not_imp_not.mp (by
      intro hn
      exact hbad hn)) (by
        intro _
        exact ⟨hbits, heq⟩)
  exact hbad hgood

by
  intro w args e h hn
  exact h (by
    rcases hn with ⟨_, rfl⟩
    simpa using (Nat.mod_lt _ (pow_pos (by decide) w)))

by
  intro w args e h h'
  rcases h' with ⟨_, heq⟩
  apply h
  simpa [heq]

by
  intro w args e h hn
  rcases hn with ⟨_, he⟩
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    simpa [he] using (ZMod.val_lt (bits2num (p := p) (w := w) args) (2 ^ w))
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h hn
  exact h (bits_good w args e (by simpa [hn.2]))

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  rcases h' with ⟨_, heq⟩
  apply h
  simpa [heq]

by
  intro w args e h hn
  have := bits_good (p := p) (w := w) (args := args) (e := e)
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have := this (hn.2 ▸ by simpa using hn.1)
    simpa using this
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h
  intro hgood
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have hg := bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e
    have hg' : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → assert_bits args ∧ e = bits2num args := by
      intro hlt
      simpa [and_comm, and_left_comm, and_assoc] using hg w args e hlt
    exact (by
      have := hg (w := w) (args := args) (e := e)
      exact this (by
        by_contra hn
        exact h (by
          have := (bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e) hn
          exact (this.1)))
    )
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    rcases h' with ⟨_, heq⟩
    simpa [heq] using e.eval.val_lt
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h hn
  rcases hn with ⟨_, heq⟩
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    simpa [heq]
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h hn
  rcases hn with ⟨_, he⟩
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    simpa [he] using (ZMod.val_lt (bits2num (p := p) (w := w) args) (by
      exact_mod_cast (pow_pos (by decide : (0:ℕ) < 2) w)))
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h h'
  exact h (by
    have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
      simpa [h'.2]
    exact this)

by
  intro w args e h hn
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    rcases hn with ⟨_, hEq⟩
    simpa [hEq]
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e hbad
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨_, heq⟩
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have := ZMod.val_lt (e.eval)
    simpa [heq] using this
  exact hbad this

by
  intro w args e h hn
  exact h (bits_good p inst✝ w args e hn).1

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  rcases h' with ⟨_, heq⟩
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    simpa [heq] using h
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e hw h
  rcases h with ⟨_, he⟩
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    simpa [he] using (show (bits2num args).val < 2 ^ w from by
      exact ZMod.val_lt (bits2num args))
  exact hw this

by
  intro w args e h hn
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    rcases hn with ⟨_, he⟩
    have : e.eval.val = (bits2num args).val := by
      simpa [he] using rfl
    have hb : (bits2num args).val < 2 ^ w := by
      induction w with
      | zero =>
        have : args = #v[] := by simp
        simp [bits2num, this]
      | succ w ih =>
        have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
          ext i hi
          cases i with
          | zero => simp
          | succ i =>
            simp [add_comm]
        simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
        rw [this]
        have hw : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
        have := ih (args := args.extract 1)
        have ht : (bits2num (args.extract 1)).val < 2 ^ w := by
          simpa [hw] using this
        have hh : args.head.val ≤ 1 := by
          have : args.head.val < p := (ZMod.val_lt args.head)
          exact le_trans (Nat.le_pred_of_lt this) (Nat.pred_le_pred this)
        have : (bits2num (Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head)).val < 2 ^ (w + 1) := by
          have : (args.head + 2 * bits2num (args.extract 1)).val < 2 ^ (w + 1) := by
            have : (args.head + 2 * bits2num (args.extract 1)).val ≤ args.head.val + 2 * (bits2num (args.extract 1)).val := by
              exact le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt (ZMod.val_lt _)) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
            have : args.head.val + 2 * (bits2num (args.extract 1)).val < 2 ^ (w + 1) := by
              have : args.head.val + 2 * (bits2num (args.extract 1)).val < 2 + 2 * (2 ^ w) := by
                exact Nat.add_lt_add_of_le_of_lt hh (Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left ht (by decide))
              simpa [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm,
                Nat.add_comm, two_mul] using this
            exact lt_of_le_of_lt this this
          simpa [bits2num, Vector.foldl] using this
        simpa [bits2num, Vector.foldl] using this
    exact lt_of_eq_of_lt this hb
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have := bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e
    exact (this.1 h').1
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h hn
  apply h
  have : e.eval = bits2num args := by
    simpa [hn.2]
  simpa [this] using hn.1

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have := bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e
    exact (this h').1
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h hn
  exact h (bits_good w args e).1

by
  intro w args e hw h
  have := bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := this (by simpa [h.2])
  exact hw this

by
  intro w args e h hn
  rcases hn with ⟨_, he⟩
  apply h
  simpa [he]

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  have := bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have := this
    exact this (by
      rcases h' with ⟨hb, he⟩
      exact by
        simpa [he] using hb)
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e hbad
  intro h
  have hgood : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have := bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e
    exact (this.1 (by simpa [h.2]))
  exact hbad hgood

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have hEq : e.eval = bits2num args := by
      simpa [h'.2]
    have : (bits2num args).val < 2 ^ w := by
      unfold bits2num
      induction w with
      | zero =>
        have : args = #v[] := by simp
        simp [this]
      | succ w ih =>
        have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
          ext i hi
          cases i with
          | zero =>
            simp
            rfl
          | succ i =>
            simp [add_comm]
        simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
        rw [this]
        have : (bits2num (args.extract 1)).val < 2 ^ w := by
          have : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
          simpa [this] using ih (args.extract 1)
        have hb : (args.head : ZMod p).val < 2 := by
          exact ZMod.val_lt args.head
        have hacc : (2 * bits2num (args.extract 1) : ZMod p).val < 2 ^ (w + 1) := by
          have : (2 : ℕ) * (bits2num (args.extract 1)).val < 2 * (2 ^ w) := by
            exact Nat.mul_lt_mul_left 2 this
          simpa [pow_succ, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm] using this
        have hadd :
            (args.head + 2 * bits2num (args.extract 1) : ZMod p).val <
              args.head.val + (2 * bits2num (args.extract 1) : ZMod p).val := by
          exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
        have : (args.head + 2 * bits2num (args.extract 1) : ZMod p).val < 2 ^ (w + 1) := by
          have : args.head.val + (2 * bits2num (args.extract 1) : ZMod p).val < 2 + 2 ^ (w + 1) := by
            exact Nat.add_lt_add hb hacc
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_trans hadd this) (by
            simpa [pow_succ, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
              using (Nat.le_add_right (2 ^ (w + 1)) 2))
        simpa using this
    simpa [hEq] using this
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have : e.eval = (bits2num args) := by
      simpa [Exp.eval] using congrArg Exp.eval h'.2
    simpa [this] using (ZMod.val_lt (bits2num args) (2 ^ w))
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h
  intro h'
  have := bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e
  have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := this w args e (by
    rcases h' with ⟨ha, he⟩
    exact False.elim (h (by
      have := (this w args e ?_).1
      · exact this
      · exact ⟨ha, by simpa [he]⟩))
  exact h this

by
  intro w args e h h'
  exact h (bits_good w args e h').1

by
  intro w args e hbad
  intro h
  have hlt : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := by
    have := bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e
    have hgood : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → assert_bits args ∧ e = bits2num args := this
    have : assert_bits args ∧ e = bits2num args := h
    exact (by
      by_contra hn
      exact hbad (by
        have := (bits_good (p := p) (inst✝ := inst✝) w args e)
        exact this hn).1.elim)
  exact hbad hlt
